name: Bruce Barth
abstract: Bruce David Barth (born September 7, 1958) is a jazz pianist, composer, and producer.

concerts.label: Karrin Allyson and Luciana Souza, Singers
An Evening of Music for One Piano, Four Hands

about_quotes.speaker: Steve Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: my good friend and partner Bruce Barth, we met around that time and started jamming together... we’ve been working together now for like fourteen years
